description: A security audit has identified that managed devices in OpManager are using the insecure default SNMP community string 'public'. A security hardening policy document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/snmp_security_policy.txt. Review the policy, identify all affected devices, and implement the required credential changes. Additionally, add the new device specified in the policy with its designated secure credentials. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
